actionPlan.title: Chemistry Fundamentals Review
actionPlan.description: Spend dedicated time reviewing and practicing problems related to oxidation and reduction, chemical equations, and types of chemical reactions to solidify understanding

actionPlan.title: Economics Quick Revision
actionPlan.description: Briefly review Economics notes and practice a few questions to ensure concepts are fresh and to identify any potential gaps

actionPlan.title: Mixed Subject Practice Test
actionPlan.description: Take a practice test that includes both Chemistry and Economics questions to assess understanding and application of concepts in a timed environment

report.summary: The student is demonstrating a strong foundation in Economics, but Chemistry is presenting challenges that are impacting overall performance, with specific weak areas in chemical reactions and equations. Focused revision in these areas can significantly boost overall accuracy.
strengths: Economics understanding is a notable strength
Ability to achieve high accuracy in certain subjects
weaknesses: Chemistry fundamentals, particularly in oxidation and reduction
Inconsistent performance across different Chemistry topics

focusDistribution.reason: To address persistent weak areas in chemical reactions and equations
To reinforce and potentially increase accuracy in the subject
